raw_title: Going Local? Localized Rhetoric in Congressional Communications
title_en: Going Local? Localized Rhetoric in Congressional Communications
title_zh: 走向本土化？国会沟通中的本土化修辞
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了美国国会议员在沟通中是否以及如何使用本土化的修辞策略，即调整语言和内容以更好地与地方选民建立联系。
plain_summary_en: This study examines whether and how U.S. Congress members use localized rhetoric in their communications, adapting language and content to better connect with local constituents.
research_direction_zh: 研究政治传播中修辞策略的适应性和地方化趋势，特别是在立法机构沟通中的应用。
research_direction_en: Investigating the adaptation and localization of rhetorical strategies in political communication, particularly within legislative communications.
